seo.title: Alex Morgan — Professional Photographer
seo.description: New York-based professional photographer specializing in portraits, editorial, engagement, and event photography. Available for bookings worldwide.

hero.imageAlt: Alex Morgan capturing a golden-hour portrait session in Central Park

aboutTeaser.heading: Where Spontaneity Takes the Lead
aboutTeaser.body: I believe the most powerful images happen in unscripted moments — a glance, a laugh, a shaft of light. My approach blends careful composition with the freedom to follow what's alive in the room.

pillars.title: My Vision
pillars.body: To create photographs that outlast the moment — images that feel true years from now and carry the emotional weight of being there.

pillars.title: My Mission
pillars.body: Bring world-class editorial craft to every project, whether it's an intimate couple session or a global brand campaign.

home.benefitStatement: Every photograph I take is driven by a single question: will this still feel meaningful in ten years? I combine technical precision with genuine human connection to ensure the answer is always yes.

services.title: Portrait Photography
services.description: From executive headshots to intimate lifestyle portraits, I create images that reveal the real you — confident, authentic, and timeless. Every session is tailored to your vision, brand, and personality.
deliverables: Professional skin retouching on all selects
Private online gallery with download rights
Usage rights for personal & commercial use
services.imageAlt: Portrait photography session with warm natural lighting

services.title: Engagement & Couples
services.description: Love looks best when it's unposed. My engagement sessions follow your chemistry, exploring locations that feel meaningful to you both — then letting the story unfold naturally.
deliverables: Custom 2-hour shoot at a location of your choice
services.imageAlt: Couple sharing a candid laugh during a golden-hour engagement session

services.title: Event Photography
services.description: Corporate conferences, gallery openings, product launches, celebrations — I document the energy, the connections, and the details that make your event worth remembering.
deliverables: 48-hour turnaround on a selection of key shots
services.imageAlt: Candid event photography showing guests networking at a rooftop gathering

items.title: Falling in Love
items.coverAlt: Couple holding hands walking through autumn Central Park leaves
items.description: An intimate engagement session winding through Central Park as October light turned everything golden.

items.title: Corazón
items.coverAlt: Editorial portrait series set in a sun-drenched Havana courtyard
items.description: A personal editorial project exploring identity and memory through portraiture in Havana.

items.title: Midnight Confessions
items.coverAlt: Moody night portrait with neon reflections on wet pavement
items.description: A late-night portrait series shot entirely on city streets with available neon and streetlight.

items.title: Caught in the Moment
items.coverAlt: Documentary street photography — a child chasing pigeons in Times Square
items.description: Street documentary series capturing unguarded human moments across Manhattan.

items.title: Architecture of Light
items.coverAlt: Long-exposure architectural image of the Oculus transportation hub
items.description: A geometric exploration of New York's most iconic modern structures at dusk and dawn.

items.title: The Quiet Season
items.coverAlt: Snowy Central Park bench in the blue hour of a January morning
items.description: A meditative winter series — empty parks, frozen ponds, and the city at its most introspective.

testimonials.quote: Alex has an extraordinary ability to make people feel at ease in front of the camera. Our brand shoot exceeded every expectation — the images are breathtaking.
testimonials.name: James T.

testimonials.quote: We've worked with dozens of photographers over the years, and Alex stands in a class of their own. The engagement session felt effortless and the photos are pure magic.
testimonials.name: Sofia & Marco R.

testimonials.quote: Our annual conference coverage was flawless. Alex captured the energy of 500 attendees without missing a single keynote moment. We'll definitely be booking again.
testimonials.name: Priya K.

testimonials.quote: The portraits Alex delivered for our executive team transformed our website presence overnight. Professional, warm, and incredibly fast to turn around.
testimonials.name: David L.

testimonials.quote: Booking Alex was the best decision we made for our product launch. The images were on our homepage within 48 hours and the response has been overwhelming.
testimonials.name: Yuki M.

about.headline: Hi, I'm Alex — an independent professional photographer based in New York City.
about.body: I've spent a decade building a practice rooted in two beliefs: that the camera should be invisible, and that every subject deserves to feel truly seen. I work across portraiture, editorial, commercial, and documentary photography — always chasing the image that feels honest. When I'm not on set, I mentor emerging photographers and travel to find new light.
about.imageAlt: Alex Morgan photographing a subject in a sunlit loft studio

whatIDo.title: What I Do
whatIDo.body: I help individuals, brands, and organizations tell their stories through photography that is technically precise and emotionally resonant. From a single executive portrait to a multi-day brand campaign, I bring the same level of care and craft to every frame.

tools.name: Canon EOS R5
tools.description: Primary camera body for all studio and on-location work

tools.name: Canon EOS R6 Mark II
tools.description: Backup body and preferred choice for fast-moving events

tools.name: RF 50mm f/1.2L
tools.description: My go-to portrait lens — renders skin beautifully

tools.name: RF 85mm f/1.2L DS
tools.description: Defocus Smoothing version for creamy background separation

tools.name: RF 24-70mm f/2.8L
tools.description: Versatile zoom for events and environmental portraits

tools.name: Adobe Lightroom Classic
tools.description: Primary culling, color grading, and export workflow

tools.name: Profoto B10 Plus
tools.description: Off-camera flash system for location and studio lighting

tools.name: Carbon fiber tripod
tools.description: Gitzo GT3543LS — indispensable for architecture work

brandTestimonials.quote: Alex's eye for light and narrative is unmatched. The campaign imagery they delivered for us doubled our social engagement.
brandTestimonials.name: Sofia Rivera

brandTestimonials.quote: We needed photographs that felt real and alive, not over-produced. Alex delivered exactly that — images we're still using three years later.
brandTestimonials.name: Tom Hayashi

brandTestimonials.quote: Hiring Alex for our lookbook was one of the best investments of the season. The quality speaks for itself.
brandTestimonials.name: Isabelle Voss
brandTestimonials.role: Head of Styling, Hermès New York

awards.title: Finalist — Commercial Photographer of the Year

contactPage.heading: Contact Us
contactPage.intro: Passionate about photography that moves people? Let's create something together.
contactPage.formIntro: Eager to bring your vision to life? Tell me about your project and I'll be in touch within 48 hours.
contactPage.successMessage: Thank you — I'll be in touch within 48 hours.
contactPage.successSubMessage: While you wait, come say hello on Instagram.

footer.tagline: Capture life's most meaningful moments — from quiet everyday beauty to landmark celebrations.
